title: Date-Night Japanese Mirin-Hon Inari-Zushi
description: A romantic twist on the classic Japanese inari-zushi, featuring rich mirin-hon and tender abalone. Serve with wasabi and pickled ginger for added flair.

ingredients.name: Abalone
ingredients.notes: Fresh or frozen, sliced into thin rounds.

ingredients.name: Grated ginger
ingredients.notes: For added flavor in the mirin-hon sauce.

ingredients.name: Soy sauce
ingredients.notes: For added depth in the mirin-hon sauce.

ingredients.name: Sugar
ingredients.notes: For balance in the mirin-hon sauce.

instructions: Mix mirin-hon, soy sauce, sugar, and water in a saucepan to make the mirin-hon sauce.
Bring the mirin-hon sauce to a boil, then reduce the heat to a simmer and cook for 10 minutes.
Meanwhile, fry the abalone slices in sesame oil until lightly browned.
Add the grated ginger to the mirin-hon sauce and stir to combine.
Add the pickled abalone to the mirin-hon sauce and stir to combine.
Spoon the cooked rice into nori sheets, leaving space for the filling.
Place a few slices of abalone on top of the rice, followed by a spoonful of the mirin-hon sauce.
Fold the nori sheets to form rectangular shapes and serve with wasabi and pickled ginger.
